name: hundred-million-offers
description: Create irresistible offers using the Value Equation, bonus stacking, risk-reversing guarantees, and ethical scarcity. Use when the user mentions "irresistible offer", "bonuses and guarantees", "value-to-price ratio", "offer naming", "grand slam offer", "guarantee strategy", "premium pricing justification", "make my offer more compelling", "what bonuses should I add", "stop discounting", or "people say its too expensive". Also trigger when packaging a product for higher perceived value, designing
author: wondelai
